proven_fixes.problem: linear_update_issue: status parameter expects stateId UUID but schema implies status name
proven_fixes.workaround: s version: 22.x  ## Workaround  Currently, users must obtain the workflow state UUID manually and pass that instead of the status name. This is not documented and not intuitive.
